content:
Thank you for the self-made merch from the "High-Level Diviner(高位占卜家)"! Honestly, I never thought there could even be a perfume merch! Also, would you guys want this kind of oval badge? For us, we really hope to have an official silver key in the future—this is undoubtedly the most representative souvenir of Morimens! If you have any ideas for merch, please let me know!

谢谢来自“高位占卜家”的自制周边投喂！说实话从来没想过居然还能有香水周边！此外大家会想要这种椭圆形的徽章吗？对我们自己而言，非常希望未来能够有官方出品的银钥匙，这毫无疑问是最能代表《忘却前夜》的纪念品！大家如果有什么周边想法请反馈给我！
